properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 13/23
 1. MILITARY EXERCISE JOINT VIKING 2023 WILL TAKE PLACE IN INNER AND OUTER COASTAL WATERS OF THE NORWEGIAN COAST OUT TO 50 NM OFF THE COAST FROM 62 DEGREES NORTH TO 70 DEGREES NORTH.

 2. THE EXERCISE WILL TAKE PLACE FROM 020001 UTC MAR23 TO 172359 UTC MAR23

 3. BOTH SHIPS AND AIRCRAFTS WILL BE INVOLVED IN THE EXERCISE

 4. MILITARY UNITS MAY NAVIGATE AND MANOUVRE IRREGULARLY AND WITHOUT NAVIGATIONAL LIGHTS OR AIS

 5. MILITARY UNITS MAY HAIL MERCHANT VESSELS FOR EXERCISE PURPOSES

 6. FOR FURTHER INFORMATION CONTACT NORWEGIAN NAVY DUTY OFFICER PHN +47 55 50 41 00 OR E-MAIL SJO.VS@MIL.NO

 7. CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 172359 UTC MAR23
